base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ridleys_zebbo_fly — a character (boss) from 1986 metroid. Zebbo — Ridley's Lair variant. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Zebbo — Ridley's Lair variant; emerges from pipes
